prompt: Review a plan to add Redis caching to NL suggestions when DB caching already exists

assertions.text: Identifies that the codebase already has caching (nlSuggestionRepository DB cache or inflightSuggestionGenerations map)
Flags Redis as redundant or over-engineered given existing caching mechanisms
Critiques the cache warmer (pre-generating for all projects on startup is wasteful/slow)
Proposes a simpler alternative approach (e.g., improve existing DB cache, use fingerprint-based lookup)
Review is structured with clear priority levels (critical vs minor) rather than a flat list
References specific files or code from the actual codebase (not generic advice)
